name: hoc/profile-header
description: A user-profile header HOC that combines an avatar, display name, role or subtitle, action buttons, and tabbed navigation into a single responsive layout. Provides ProfileHeader, ProfileHeaderAvatar, ProfileHeaderInfo, ProfileHeaderActions, and ProfileHeaderTabs primitives with cover-photo support, status badges, and editable fields. Composed of Avatar, Button, Tabs, and Badge components with theme-aware spacing.
useCases: Social-media profile pages with avatar, bio, follower stats, and 'Follow' or 'Message' actions
Team-directory cards showing employee photos, job titles, departments, and contact buttons
E-commerce seller storefront headers with store logo, rating, and 'Contact Seller' tabs
Admin user-detail pages combining identity info, role badges, and edit/delete actions
usage: import { ProfileHeader, ProfileHeaderAvatar, ProfileHeaderInfo, ProfileHeaderActions } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/profile-header"
